Global Variable# kCMVideoCodecType_DVCProPAL

A type that identifies the Panasonic DVCPro PAL format.iOSiPadOSMac CatalystmacOStvOSvisionOSwatchOS

```
var kCMVideoCodecType_DVCProPAL: CMVideoCodecType { get }
```
